zh.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montague是John de Montagu和Maude Fraunceys的兒子，於1400年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛。他於1425年與Elizabeth De Montfort在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 邁克爾 羅雅爾 煙雨 聖 馬丁 文崔。

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Pierce  .

variants.name: Pierce
meanings: English, Welsh, and Irish: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Piers, Peres, Peris, an Old French nominative of Pierre or Per, the French form of Peter . Pierce is especially frequent in northwestern Wales and Lancashire, while Pearce is the more common spelling in the rest of England. In Ireland Pierce and Pearse represent a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Piarais ‘son of Piaras’, a Gaelicized form of Piers.
Americanized form of some similar-sounding Jewish surname.
History: Franklin Pierce (1804–69), 14th president of the US, was born in Hillsborough, NH, on the New England frontier. His English ancestor Thomas Pierce emigrated to Charlestown, MA, in 1633/34.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montague was born in 1400, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the son of John de Montagu and Maude Fraunceys. He married Elizabeth De Montfort in 1425, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1492, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92, and was buried in St Michael Royal with St Martin Vintry, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montague est né en 1400, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John de Montagu et Maude Fraunceys. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Montfort en 1425, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1492, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael Royal with St Martin Vintry, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montagueは1400年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトフロメでJohn de MontaguとMaude Fraunceysの息子として生まれた。1425年にイギリスソメルセトでElizabeth De Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年にイギリスイギリスロンドンブレンドンで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト ミチャエル ロイアル ウィス スト マルティン ヴィントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montague(은)는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 John de Montagu(와)과 Maude Fraunceys의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1425년 영국 서머세트에서 Elizabeth De Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 믹하얼 로야 위스 스트 마틴 빈트리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Piers Of Montague родился в 1400 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John de Montagu и Maude Fraunceys. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Montfort в 1425 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1492 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел рояль вит ст мартинь винтри, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
